_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Perform virus scanning on digital media.
reference_document_element_description: Monitor data quality within the assigned domain, document issues, initiate remediation workflows, and track resolution to closure.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-T-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.345), TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.319).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 1.1/10 (raw 0.114). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [digital, media, perform, scanning, virus] vs WIDAI-only terms [assigned, closure, data, document, domain, initiate] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.893, R=0.851). P exceeds R by 0.042 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.3%, N:64.3%, C:35.4%). No dominant classification for "Perform virus scanning on digital media." vs "Monitor data quality within the assigned domain, document issues, initiate remed" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.369 > STS 0.114 (gap +0.255). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [digital, media, perform, scanning, virus]. WIDAI terms: [assigned, closure, data, document, domain, initiate].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.255 with low STS 0.114. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
